name: Balena
description: Balena is a container-based IoT fleet management platform. Deploy, manage, and monitor fleets of Linux devices running Docker containers with remote device actions, environment variable configuration, and release management via an OData-based REST API.

capabilities.name: devices_list
capabilities.description: List all devices with online status, OS version, and connectivity info.

capabilities.name: devices_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed info about a specific device by ID or UUID.

capabilities.name: devices_update
capabilities.description: Update device name, notes, or configuration.

capabilities.name: devices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a device from the fleet.

capabilities.name: devices_restart_application
capabilities.description: Restart the application on a device.

capabilities.name: applications_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific application by ID.

capabilities.name: env_vars_list
capabilities.description: List environment variables for a device or application.

capabilities.name: releases_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific release by ID.

capabilities.name: device_tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags for a device.

capabilities.name: device_tags_create
capabilities.description: Add a tag to a device.
